yearBoundaryAnalysis.reason: 2019 admissions use the 2016학년도 이후 CS section before the 2020+ capstone requirement, URP/IS500 elective expansion, and later Co-op/CoE changes.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: 2016학년도 이후 입학생 / 전공 49 / 전공필수 19 / 전공선택 30
심화전공 12 / 복수전공 40 / 연구 3 / Co-op 9학점

yearBoundaryAnalysis.reason: 2020 is the first admission slice where the capstone team-project rule explicitly applies to CS 주전공 and 복수전공 students.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: 캡스톤 팀 프로젝트 ... 2020학년도 이후 입학생부터 적용됨
심화전공 12 / 복수전공 40 / 연구 3

yearBoundaryAnalysis.reason: 2021 keeps the capstone rule and adds two new elective-provenance clauses: other-department individual study/URP495 and IS500 mutual-recognition electives.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: 전공선택으로 인정하는 개별연구의 범위에는 타 학과 개별연구와 URP495를 모두 인정함 / 정보보호대학원 선택 과목(IS500번대) 인정
연구 3 / Co-op 9학점

yearBoundaryAnalysis.reason: 2022 preserves the 2021 rule family but updates the SoC Co-op replacement wording to handle already-completed CS490/CS409 courses explicitly.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: SoC Co-op 1 참여 이전에 CS490/CS409를 기이수한 경우 해당 학점을 자유선택으로 인정
URP495 / IS500 elective recognition 유지

yearBoundaryAnalysis.reason: 2023 adds CoE elective recognition up to 6 credits, expands the AI concentration course list, and upgrades SoC Co-op to the 21-credit replacement family. 2024 keeps the same old-code core and adds the optional information-security specialization note.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: 공과대학 CoE코드를 6학점까지 인정 / AI 중점이수 과목 확대
SoC Co-op 1 최대 21학점에 한해 CS490, CS408, CS409로 대체 인정
정보보호 특성화 트랙(보안SW개발) 중점이수 (선택사항) 추가

yearBoundaryAnalysis.reason: 2025 preserves the 2023-2024 CS rule family but renumbers the undergraduate course set into the dotted code system.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: SoC Co-op 1 최대 21학점 / CoE 6학점 / 정보보호 특성화 트랙 notes
전공 49 / 전공필수 19 / CS204, CS206, CS300, CS311, CS320, CS330 / CS204, CS311 대체규칙
심화전공 12 / 부전공 21(전공필수 15 포함) / 복수전공 40 / 연구 3 / Co-op 9학점

supportLimitations: URP/타학과 개별연구/IS500 elective counting needs analyzer-side provenance checks.
SoC Co-op retroactive free-elective handling needs analyzer-side course-history checks.
SoC Co-op 21-credit replacement and CoE 6-credit caps both need transcript-aware implementation.
2024 optional information-security specialization remains note-level only in this wave.
2025 uses the dotted code family and still needs analyzer-side code normalization and capstone-pool implementation.
